title: Battery and Steel Wool Fire
symptoms: Have a 9-volt or AA batteries and fine steel wool
immediate_steps: Prepare a tinder bundle (dry grass, cotton, dryer lint) and place the steel wool in the center
Take a 9-volt battery and rub both terminals against the steel wool
The steel wool will short-circuit the battery and immediately glow red-hot
Blow gently into the tinder bundle until it catches flame
avoid: Do not do this in high winds without shielding the spark
Do not use coarse steel wool (it requires very fine, e.g., 0000 grade)
